title: ScarVCell: an auditable fibroblast repair-state coordinate for pathological scarring
description: Curated final reproducibility release for a frozen 18-gene fibroblast scar-state coordinate. The archive contains final analysis scripts, prespecified locks, accession and analysis-unit audits, processed non-identifiable outputs, publication figures and integrity records. Public source archives are referenced but not redistributed.
